description.zh: 把智能体的配置、Scale、说明文档和下载入口统一整理成一个客户可理解的交付包。
description.en: A delivery package that unifies agent configuration, scales, documentation, and download entry points into something customers can understand.

longDescription.zh: 每个智能体页面都不只是介绍能力，而是直接提供配置摘要、Scale 摘要、下载文件和 GitHub 源路径，让它既能当产品介绍页，也能当交付清单。
longDescription.en: Every agent page does more than describe capabilities. It also exposes config summaries, scale summaries, download files, and GitHub source paths, so it works both as a product page and as a delivery checklist.

challenge.zh: 很多 Agent 产品只能看到概念，缺少真正能下载和复用的资产。
challenge.en: Many agent products stop at concepts and lack assets that can actually be downloaded and reused.

solution.zh: 把每个智能体对应的配置文件和 Scale 文档纳入仓库，并在页面上明确展示“怎么下、怎么用、源文件在哪”。
solution.en: We put every agent's config file and scale document in the repository and clearly expose where to download them, how to use them, and where their source files live.

outcomes.zh: 让“智能体”页面真正具备下载与交付意义。
outcomes.en: Turned the agents section into a real download and delivery surface.
